task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into OpenEMR and accesses the main dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenEMR login screen followed by the main dashboard, calendar, or navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Agent searches for and selects patient Rosetta Effertz
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the patient finder search results or the patient dashboard with 'Rosetta Effertz' (DOB: 1965-04-18) clearly visible in the patient header/banner.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Procedure Order section
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Procedure Order' screen, modal, or menu selection under Procedures/Visits.

task_completion.description: Agent selects 'Lipid Panel' as the procedure to order
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the order form showing 'Lipid Panel' selected in the procedure/test field.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the required clinical indication/diagnosis details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing text matching 'Annual wellness exam - cardiovascular screening' entered into the clinical indication, diagnosis, or note field.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the order and it appears in the patient's list of procedure orders
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the saved order in a list or table (e.g., 'Electronic Reports' or 'Procedure Orders' list) for Rosetta Effertz, displaying 'Lipid Panel' with a status indicating it is ordered/active.

integrity.description: Agent uses the OpenEMR web interface to perform actions
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenEMR interface, not a terminal or command line executing SQL/scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the actual OpenEMR software
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface elements (colors, layout, fonts) match the standard OpenEMR theme, not a text editor or mock form.

integrity.description: Agent does not simulate the task by typing the outcome in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show the agent merely typing 'Order placed for Rosetta Effertz' into a notepad or chat window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Rosetta Effertz. DOB: 1965-04-18. Target Test: Lipid Panel. Required Clinical Indication: 'Annual wellness exam - cardiovascular screening'.
